metadata.title: Dolos UTxO RPC Implementation Tasks
metadata.description: Add a parallel Dolos UTxO RPC Cardano backend across the Rust runtime surfaces that currently use direct Blockfrost, then validate, test, and finalize the implementation.

phases.name: Code Changes
phases.description: Implement the new UTxO RPC connector and wire it into the Rust runtime surfaces that currently instantiate or configure Blockfrost.

tasks.title: Add the UTxO RPC connector crate and workspace wiring
tasks.description: Create a new `cardano-connector-utxorpc` crate, add the required workspace dependencies, and establish the minimal crate structure needed for a direct Dolos UTxO RPC implementation to live beside the existing Blockfrost connector.
acceptance: The workspace contains a new `cardano-connector-utxorpc` crate
The new crate builds in the Rust workspace
The existing Blockfrost connector remains available in parallel

tasks.title: Implement the UTxO RPC connector core
tasks.description: Implement UTxO RPC client construction, explicit network configuration, health checks, live protocol parameter derivation, UTxO lookup and mapping, `utxos_at` semantics, and transaction submission so the new crate satisfies the existing `CardanoConnector` contract without Blockfrost-only assumptions.
acceptance: The new connector implements `network`, `health`, `protocol_parameters`, `utxos_at`, and `submit`
Protocol parameters are derived from UTxO RPC data rather than static per-network presets
`utxos_at(payment, None)` returns UTxOs for any address sharing the payment credential regardless of delegation
Transaction submission works through Dolos and returns actionable failures

tasks.title: Wire backend selection into the Rust runtime surfaces
tasks.description: Replace the current hard-wired Blockfrost runtime bindings with explicit backend selection across `konduit-server` and `konduit-cli`, add the UTxO RPC config surface, and enforce the agreed Dolos readiness checks where startup validation is required.
acceptance: `konduit-server` supports explicit backend selection between `blockfrost` and `utxorpc`
`konduit-cli` can select either `blockfrost` or `utxorpc`
Server and CLI config parsing support explicit UTxO RPC URI and network values
Current CLI runtime flows can execute against the UTxO RPC backend
The server fails startup when Dolos is unreachable, on the wrong network, missing live parameters, or missing the configured reference script UTxO
The existing Blockfrost server and CLI paths remain available in parallel

phases.name: Validation, Testing, and Final Docs
phases.description: Add strong automated coverage, validate the integrated runtime path, and finalize any remaining Rust-runtime-facing docs after the code path is working.

tasks.title: Add connector unit tests for mapping, parameters, semantics, and submit errors
tasks.description: Add focused automated tests around UTxO mapping, live protocol parameter derivation, network handling, `utxos_at` behavior, and submission error translation in the new connector crate so the core backend logic is well covered before broader runtime validation.
acceptance: Automated tests cover successful and failing Cardano data mapping cases
Automated tests cover live protocol parameter derivation and error paths
Automated tests explicitly cover `utxos_at(payment, None)` semantics
Automated tests cover submit-path error translation

tasks.title: Add server and CLI tests for backend selection and readiness checks
tasks.description: Add automated coverage for server and CLI backend selection, config parsing, and the UTxO RPC readiness rules so the runtime surfaces are protected against regressions without depending on manual operator checks for every iteration.
acceptance: Automated tests cover backend selection for both server and CLI
Automated tests cover invalid UTxO RPC configuration and readiness failures
Automated tests protect the existing Blockfrost path from regression

tasks.title: Add autonomous integrated smoke coverage and run workspace verification
tasks.description: Add the smallest useful autonomous smoke coverage for the integrated UTxO RPC path, then run the relevant workspace build and test commands so the implementation is validated beyond isolated unit tests.
acceptance: There is automated smoke coverage for the integrated UTxO RPC runtime path
The relevant Rust workspace targets build and test cleanly for the touched surfaces
The integrated smoke coverage remains autonomous and suitable for repeat execution

tasks.title: Run live Dolos validation and capture operator evidence
tasks.description: Perform the required manual or operator-assisted validation against a real Dolos-backed environment so the implemented UTxO RPC path is checked against live reachability, readiness, and at least one end-to-end submission path rather than only mocked or autonomous test coverage.
acceptance: A real Dolos-backed validation run is performed or handed off truthfully to the operator
Validation covers reachability, configured network match, live protocol parameter derivation, and reference script resolution
Validation includes at least one live transaction submission path or a clearly documented blocker

tasks.title: Finalize Rust-runtime documentation and implementation cleanup
tasks.description: Update any remaining Rust-runtime-facing documentation that still assumes Blockfrost-only behavior, record the final UTxO RPC configuration and readiness model, and perform any small cleanup discovered during validation so the implementation lands in a reviewable state.
acceptance: Relevant docs describe the final Rust runtime behavior rather than Blockfrost-only assumptions
The UTxO RPC config and readiness model are documented clearly
The touched implementation surfaces are left in a clean, reviewable state
